overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, beginning on a wet neon-lit street, ascending through a covered hotel entrance with color-shifting lighting, navigating elevated walkways and plazas filled with holographic advertisements. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring vivid neon colors, reflective wet surfaces, and dense urban architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking along rain-slicked street toward illuminated hotel entrance with neon accents

entered.detail: illuminated signage reading WILD BLUE HOTEL & SPA with art deco styling
large glass facade with glowing green canopy and stairs leading upward
horizontal purple neon tubes running along building edges
reflective wet black asphalt with puddles reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a dark wet street in a futuristic city, with the camera approaching the entrance to the Wild Blue Hotel. Neon purple light strips accent the buildings, and the wet asphalt reflects the vibrant artificial lighting. The atmosphere is cyberpunk noir with tall glass towers surrounding the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered hotel entrance stairs and corridor with color-changing lighting

events.description: beginning ascent of wide marble stairs into covered entrance
corridor lighting shifts from warm yellow to vibrant pink and magenta

agents.ego_description: climbing wide marble stairs into covered walkway with glass ceiling and potted palms

wide white marble staircase with black bollards at base
tropical palm plants in large planters flanking the stairs
interior walls bathed in vibrant pink and magenta neon light

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a grand marble staircase into a covered hotel entrance. The space features a geometric glass ceiling and potted palm trees. As the camera progresses deeper into the corridor, the lighting dramatically shifts from warm yellow to intense pink and magenta, creating a surreal atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with city overlook

events.description: exiting covered corridor onto open elevated walkway with city views
passing pedestrian walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated outdoor walkway with glass railings overlooking the neon city

transparent glass safety barrier along walkway edge
yellow and white market umbrellas over outdoor dining tables
tall futuristic towers covered in holographic advertisements and neon lights

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered corridor, the scene opens onto an elevated walkway with panoramic views of the neon-drenched city. A massive Buxom Betty's billboard dominates the view ahead. The camera passes a pedestrian in white clothing while walking past outdoor seating areas with yellow umbrellas and glass railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower plaza with food stalls and market seating

events.description: descending stairs from elevated walkway to lower plaza level

agents.ego_description: descending stairs into lower plaza area with food stalls and outdoor dining

notable_agents.action: person in dark coat walking past camera on the left side

entered.detail: small vendor booths with illuminated menus and neon trim
bright yellow outdoor umbrellas over seating areas
large red digital advertisement with text ZEIG DICH showing a figure with microphone

segments.scene_description: The camera descends into a lower plaza level featuring food stall kiosks and outdoor seating with bright yellow umbrellas. A large red billboard displaying ZEIG DICH is visible on the right. The area has moderate foot traffic with pedestrians walking through the market-like space.

events.description: beginning ascent of stairs from lower to upper plaza

agents.ego_description: climbing wide concrete stairs with metal railings toward upper plaza

entered.detail: wide grey concrete staircase with textured surface
silver metal handrails with illuminated blue accent lights
massive curved advertising screens displaying holographic content

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide concrete staircase with metal handrails, transitioning from the lower market plaza to an upper level. Large digital billboards become visible on the surrounding buildings, displaying holographic advertisements that illuminate the stairwell with shifting colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper pedestrian plaza with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through upper plaza toward distant stairs surrounded by massive holographic displays

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians standing and conversing near the distant stairway

entered.detail: wide staircase leading to higher level in the distance
giant curved digital screens showing animated advertisements and brand logos
trees wrapped in colorful fairy lights and neon decorations

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the camera enters a wide upper plaza surrounded by massive holographic billboards and decorative light trees. The space is relatively open with a few pedestrians visible in the distance near another set of stairs. The environment is dominated by giant digital advertising screens creating a immersive cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, rain-slicked street into the heart of a vibrant, multi-level cyberpunk plaza. It begins on wet asphalt reflecting purple neon strips as the camera approaches the Wild Blue Hotel, then ascends a marble staircase into a covered entrance where the lighting shifts from warm yellow to intense magenta. The scene then opens onto an elevated walkway dominated by a massive Buxom Betty's billboard before descending into a bustling lower plaza filled with food kiosks and bright yellow umbrellas. As the camera climbs a wide concrete staircase, the environment transitions from the market-like atmosphere to an upper level illuminated by shifting holographic advertisements. Finally, the movement concludes in a wide upper plaza surrounded by decorative light trees and giant digital screens that immerse the space in a glow of artificial color.
